---
title: "loop.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/loop.py"
loc: 163
complexity: 20
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 4.84
overall_score: 2.82
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignForge, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 31 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [gc](file://gc)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [os](file://os)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.norn](file://src.sentinel.wardens.norn)
- [src.tools.wrap_it_up](file://src.tools.wrap_it_up)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)

### Exports
- `SovereignForge`
- `__init__`
- `forge_task`
- `_write_handshake`
- `_orient_target`
- `_generate_code`
- `call_uplink`
- `_verify_integrity`
- `_backup`
- `_rollback`
- `_cleanup_backup`
- `sovereign_lifecycle`
